title: Price Management - Adding and managing price sets
workflow_title: Price Management - Adding and managing price sets

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Price management.
Click Add Set to create a new pricing rule set.
Enter a name for the pricing rule set.
Optionally set Location, Customer and Period to control where/when the set applies.
Click All to select the product group whose prices you want to adjust.
Enter the New price (and option price or new VAT, if applicable).
Click Update Set to save the changes to the set.
Click Review price rules to review the rules you have set.
